scripts.test: npm run test:infra && npm run test:services
scripts.test:services: docker compose -f ../compose/docker-compose.yml run --build --rm gps-simulator-test && docker compose -f ../compose/docker-compose.yml run --build --rm data-ingestion-test && docker compose -f ../compose/docker-compose.yml run --build --rm road-test && docker compose -f ../compose/docker-compose.yml run --build --rm data-processing-test && docker compose -f ../compose/docker-compose.yml run --build --rm drivability-scoring-test && docker compose -f ../compose/docker-compose.yml run --build --rm route-planning-test && docker compose -f ../compose/docker-compose.yml run --build --rm ai-assistant-test && docker compose -f ../compose/docker-compose.yml run --build --rm api-test && docker compose -f ../compose/docker-compose.yml run --build --rm web-test
